stemHtml: During a co-ordinated climbing turn to the right the:

options.a: angle of attack of the left wing is larger than the angle of attack of the right wing.
options.b: angle of attack of both wings is the same.
options.c: stall angle of attack of the left wing will be larger than the corresponding angle for the right wing.
options.d: angle of attack of the left wing is smaller than the angle of attack of the right wing.
